publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Photographs. 78 photoprints 8x10 in.; 419 photonegatives 4x5 in.; 1051 photoprints, 35mm.; 1051 photognegatives, 35 mm.
did.abstract: Photographs of Cornell campus scenes and activities.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1960. Cornell Daily Sun photographer, 1959-1961.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographs of Cornell campus scenes and activities.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Gary Cowell photographs, #37-5-2370. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. 4 x 5 film: by subject, undated (ca. 1959-1961)
White Statue and Goldwin Smith Hall
Series II. 4 x 5 film: by date
Football - Cornell v. Lehigh, Band Day
Mens Dorms and Ithaca at Night
Crew - Cornell v. Dartmouth v. Detroit Boat Club
Series III. 35 mm negatives: by date
Wreck - State St. - Crane and 11 Cars
Campus - White Art Museum, Rockefeller Hall
Parents Weekend - Information Desk - Civil Defense Drill Protest (Sane)
Crew - Cornell v. Harvard and Rutgers
Wreck - State St., Ithaca - Crane and Eleven Cars
